result:
**Root cause:** `crates/lua-stdlib/src/state_stub.rs:262` — the `LuaStateStubExt::get_upvalue` trait method was a `todo!("phase-b-reconcile: get_upvalue")` stub. It panicked when `locals.lua` exercised `debug.getupvalue` via `aux_upvalue` in `debug_lib.rs:506`. (The original `module 'debug' not found` error was from a stale binary; a fresh `cargo build` revealed the real failure.)

**Fix:** Wired `get_upvalue` and the adjacent `set_upvalue` trait stubs to the existing `lua_vm::api::get_upvalue` / `api::setup_value` free functions, converting `Option<&'static [u8]>` → `Option<Vec<u8>>` for the trait's return type. Edit in `state_stub.rs` after the `remove` impl (~line 354).

**State after fix:** `cargo build -p lua-cli` is green (only pre-existing warnings, no errors). Did not re-execute the test per instructions — the mega-loop will re-test.
